❤️ CardiovascularREF: MRL-CARD-002✓ Brochure Verified

Myval Octacor Surgical Heart Valve

Myval · Heart Valves

Myval Octacor is a next-generation balloon-expandable Transcatheter Heart Valve (THV) system designed for superior hemodynamics and precise placement. Featuring a cobalt-chromium frame and bovine pericardium leaflets, it offers the widest range of sizes (including Navigator sizes) to ensure optimal fit for diverse patient anatomies.

MaterialPyrolytic Carbon

Technical Blueprint SpecificationClinical Value
available_sizes
20mm to 32mm (including Navigator intermediate sizes)

valve_type

Balloon-Expandable TAVI

frame_material

Cobalt Chromium (Co-Cr)

leaflet_material

Bovine Pericardium

delivery_system

Navigator / Python

skirt_design

External PET buffer for PVL prevention

Primary Material

Pyrolytic Carbon

Frequently Asked Questions

Myval Octacor is a next-generation balloon-expandable Transcatheter Heart Valve (THV) system designed for superior hemodynamics and precise placement. Featuring a cobalt-chromium frame and bovine pericardium leaflets, it offers the widest range of sizes (including Navigator sizes) to ensure optimal fit for diverse patient anatomies.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Myval Octacor Surgical Heart Valve, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Myval Octacor Surgical Heart Valve is constructed using Pyrolytic Carbon, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
